name: SSRF via urllib or httpx
description: User-controlled input flows into urllib.request.urlopen(), httpx.get(), or httpx.post() without URL validation. An attacker can force the server to make requests to internal services, cloud metadata endpoints (169.254.169.254), or other restricted resources.
remediation: Validate and sanitize URLs before making HTTP requests. Use an allowlist of permitted hostnames. Block requests to private and link-local IP ranges. Use urllib.parse.urlparse() to verify the scheme and host before the request.
